titleStmt.title: SII 26.482: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 482. (A.R. No. 459 of 1909.) ŚUTTAMALLI, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the same shrine.

This inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pūtala maḍandai pugaḻoḍu poliya etc., and mentions the queen Ulagamuḻuduḍaiyāḷ. It also mentions that the king was seated on Paḷḷippīḍa-Maḻavarāya [•••••] in the maṇḍapa called Pugaḻābharaṇaṉ-maṇḍapa in the inner enclosure (uḷḷālai) of the temple in Māḍakkuḻakkīḻ Madurai.

It records the gift, made by the king, of 100 drammas annually from out of the tax paid by the sabhai of Śuttamalli alias Vīraviṉōdach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Mēl-Vēmba-nāḍu for deepening the tank called Kulaśēkarappērēri at the place. The gift was made at the request of Kārambiśeṭṭu Āḻvāṉbaṭṭa Atirāṭṭiraīyājiyār, perhaps a member of the sabhai of the place. It is stated that the work of deepening of the tank started from the day when the asterism Uttiraṭṭādi fell in the month of Vaiykāśi in the 13th year of the reign of the king. It is also stated that this order was made known to the executives of the temple of the god Tirunelveli uḍaiyār also.
The signatories were Vīraviṉōda-mūvēndavēḷāṉ and Kurukularāyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūtalamaṭantai pukaḻoṭu poliya vetamun=tamiḻum meṉmaiyil viḷaṅka kaṟpuṭait tirumakaḷ poṟpuyat tiruppa tikkirunāṉkuṅ cakkaravāḻamuñ cūḻum puvaṉa meḻuṅkavitta veṇkuṭai niḻaṟkiḷ ceṅkoḷ naṭappa nāṭoṟum tiyamum nāyiṟullaṅkoḷ Āṭakap poruppilaraicu miṉitiruppac cuntaramārpil Intiraṉ pūṭṭiya Āra
mum Alaṅkalumaḻakuṭaṉ tikaḻa viḷaiyum puliyum villuñ curampuka Āṇai maṉṉavar Aṭimalar cūṭa marapil vanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi viḷaṅkiya katiroḷi virasiṅhāsaṉattu Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrīkoccaṭaiyapaṟmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4 100 4 10 5 māṭakkuḻakkiḻ maturaikkoyil ṉūḷḷālaip puka
ḻāparaṇaṉ maṇṭapattup paḷḷippiṭamaḻavarāya Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu melvempanāṭṭu cuttamalliyāṉa viraviṉotaccaturvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyār ceyyat tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi taṅkaḷūr kulaṅkalla veṇumeṉṟu kārampiceṭṭu Āḻvāṉpaṭṭa Atirāttiraiyājiyār namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil patiṉmūṉṟāvatu vaiykāci māta kaḻittu nām pi
ṟanta nāḷ Uttirāṭṭātiyile taṅkaḷūrkkuḷam kulacekarapereriyile kuḻikallukaikku tāṅkaḷiṟuttuvarum Antarāyakkaṭamaiyile Āṭṭāṇṭu toṟum nūṟu tiramam tāṉamāka nirvārttom patiṉālāvatu kārmutal Uṭaiyār tirunelveli Uṭaiyār koyilukku Aṉṟāṭu cikāriyañceyvāṉūkkum tevakaṇakkaṉūkkum Ikkeḻvi kāṭṭi Āṭṭu
nūṟu tiramam yiṟ koḻikaveṉṟum yittiramam nūṟukkum Āṭṭāṇṭum toṟum cantirātittavaṟkkum celluvatāka kallil veṭṭikkoḷkaveṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷikai kivai viraviṉotamuventaveḷāṉeḻuttu Ivai kurukularāyaṉeḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 26.482 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
